name: Kin Shing Holdings Limited
summary: Kin Shing Holdings Limited engages in erecting formworks for construction works in private residential and commercial buildings primarily in Hong Kong. The company primarily provides timber formworks by using timber and plywood; and metal formwork system by using aluminum and other metals. It also engages in building construction works; and securities investment business. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Cheung Sha Wan, Hong Kong. Kin Shing Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Five Continental Enterprise Limited.
